step_rationale: L-selectin mediates monocyte and neutrophil rolling and adhesion.
mechanism: L-selectin on monocytes and neutrophils binds endothelial ligands, mediating leukocyte rolling, tethering and recruitment into inflamed atherosclerotic plaques.

references.title: On-chip phenotypic analysis of inflammatory monocytes in atherogenesis and myocardial infarction.

references.title: Treatment of acute myocardial infarction with streptokinase does not appear to modulate circulating neutrophil function.
